_comment: DEMO FIXTURE. Two deliberately-old, known-vulnerable components with their REAL, publicly documented CVEs (from NVD). This file exists ONLY to demonstrate that the policy gate correctly catches CRITICAL/HIGH findings and blocks the build. It is NOT the output of scanning wolfBoot - wolfBoot itself is clean. The components and CVE IDs/scores are genuine; this is a controlled test fixture, the same way you would inject a known-vulnerable component to prove an SCA gate works.

components.name: openssl
components.note: Old OpenSSL pinned on purpose - a realistic firmware crypto dependency.

vulnerabilities.name: Heartbleed - TLS heartbeat read overrun (information disclosure)
CCS Injection - SSL/TLS MITM via ChangeCipherSpec
Padding oracle in AES-NI CBC MAC check

components.name: zlib
components.note: Old zlib pinned on purpose - a realistic firmware compression dependency.

vulnerabilities.name: Heap buffer over-read/overflow in inflate() via large gzip header extra field
